page_title: Sales Representative - Michael & Associates, Attorneys at Law - Application

detector_only: to apply for this role, we need to assess your english communication skills — including pronunciation, accent, and intonation. please follow these simple steps carefully: 1. go to https://vocaroo.com

do you have at least 3 years of direct sales experience in a call center environment, where your primary responsibility was generating revenue through outbound or inbound sales? please note: we are seeking candidates with proven hard sales experience. experience focused primarily on customer service, account management, retention, or upselling existing customers alone does not meet the requirements for this role.
how did you learn about the job vacancy?
if you were referred, please write the full name of the m&a employee who referred you. if you were not referred, just type n/a.
are you available to work any hours monday through saturday, from 8 am to 8 pm central time? we will assign a 40-hour shift, but full availability is .

do you have the necessary work-from-home equipment, such as a reliable pc or laptop, high-quality headset, and a stable internet connection? additionally, do you have any backup solutions in place to ensure uninterrupted workflow in case of technical issues?
how many years of sales experience do you have in a call center setting?

can you describe your previous experience in a sales call center environment, including details about the sales accounts you handled? (your input will be shared with our hiring managers, so please ens
is this your first time applying for this role? please note that previous candidates who were not selected are kindly asked not to reapply, as they will no longer be considered.
how much is your current monthly salary?
the sales intake representative role offers a base rate of $7 usd/hour plus a monthly, team-based commission. does this work for you?
do you consent to the recording of your interview if you advance to the next stage of the selection process?

ai.notes: The HTML excerpt provided is truncated, so additional fields (like resume upload, address, or custom questions) that likely exist further down the form are missing from this output.
